registry.description: query_rag.py CLI --json flag was being incorrectly parsed as a positional argument, causing failures in automated scripts.
registry.resolution: Bypassed CLI; use direct import of query_rag functions in telegram_bot.py

registry.title: Firestore composite index required for rating sort + filter combo
registry.description: Combining filters with sorting in Firestore often requires composite indexes, which are slow to build and limited in count.
registry.resolution: Python-side sort in firestore_query.py - fetch all matching docs, sort by nested field in Python, apply limit. Avoids composite index dependency entirely.

registry.title: Gemini Flash model string instability across litellm versions
registry.description: Model identifiers for Gemini Flash were inconsistent across different versions of the litellm library.
registry.resolution: Centralized model string as GEMINI_MODEL constant in scripts/utils/ollama_config.py. All litellm callers import from there.

registry.title: Flutter transitive dependency lock
registry.description: Some Flutter packages were locked to older versions due to transitive dependency constraints that were not immediately obvious.
registry.resolution: Investigated via flutter pub outdated; confirmed these were locked by parent constraints. No action possible until upstream releases.

registry.description: Flutter transitive dependency lock - 10 packages outdated but Resolvable=Current
registry.resolution: Investigated via flutter pub outdated, flutter pub deps, dart MCP pub.dev search. All 10 are transitive (flutter_map->proj4dart->mgrs_dart, Flutter SDK->meta/vector_math/test/analyzer). flutter_map 8.2.2 is latest. No action possible until upstream releases.
registry.prevention: Before planning dep upgrades, run flutter pub outdated and check Resolvable column. If Resolvable=Current, the dep is locked by parent constraints and cannot be upgraded directly.
